config.title: Analizy finansowe #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#comment '----------- universal macros ----------------------------- #include "50101"
#comment '------------------------------- implementation ------------------
dim g_arrRows : set g_arrRows = nothing dim g_pModule : set g_pModule = nothing
function fopen() : fopen = true #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
set g_arrRows = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() set g_pModule = doc_.getmodule(60198) end function
function fclose set g_pModule = nothing end function
function fsave dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() g_pModule.save_data page_.root.strNazwa,g_arrRows, pStream page_.root.fXML.Attach pStream page_.root.fXML.ext = "xml" fsave = std_fsave() end function
function fenableedit page_.enableedit = not page_.enableedit end function
function fback 'to_do: check save and save if wants page_.goback end function
function new_row_data() set new_row_data = g_pModule.new_afd_row() end function
sub c##CTRLID_GRID##_onroot_change if not page_.root.fXML.isempty() then dim strNazwa g_pModule.load_data strNazwa,g_arrRows, page_.root.fXML else g_arrRows.RemoveAll end if end sub
AVB_ALL_GRID(CTRLID_GRID,g_arrRows,new_row_data()) AVB_ALL_ROW(CTRLID_SYMBOL,g_arrRows,symbol,symbol,new_row_data()) AVB_ALL_ROW(CTRLID_NAZWA,g_arrRows,nazwa,nazwa,new_row_data()) AVB_ALL_ROW(CTRLID_WYRAZENIE,g_arrRows,wyrazenie,wyrazenie,new_row_data()) AVB_ALL_ROW(CTRLID_JEDNOSTKA,g_arrRows,jednostka,jednostka,new_row_data())
#ifdef _DEBUG function debug_obliczenia dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa obliczanie ...") g_pModule.oblicz_afd g_arrRows, DateSerial(Year(trans_.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Month(trans_.Var(GVAR_TODAY)),1),trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY),0 dim iter for iter = 0 to g_arrRows.Count() - 1 trans_.message 0,0, g_arrRows.Value(iter).symbol + "=" + cstr(g_arrRows.Value(iter).value) next end function #endif

page.body:
Nazwa
strNazwa
Symbol
Nazwa
Wyrażenie
Jed no stka
#ifdef _DEBUG Obliczenia (DEBUG) #endif
